calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for and with Denise Adams (Co-Administrator).

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that Mr. Brown would not be appearing today. The Court explained its policy regarding an attorney's dual compensation as attorney and real estate agent and noted that it was done without Court approval. The Court also stated that it read the declaration of praise from Mr. Brown regarding sale of the house and that it was prepared to approve the petition. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio appearing for and with Denise Adams.

Both petitions for letters of administration were continued to August 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for publication of Natasha Adams petition. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio is to notify Counsel for Natasha Adams of the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for and with Denise Adams. David Brown for and with Natasha Adams (Objector).

Mr. Brown informed the Court in advance of the hearing that he filed a Petition for Probate this morning with a hearing date of July 23, 2013. At commencement of the hearing, Counsel informed the Court that the Petitioners agree to and will stipulate to being appointed as Co-Administrators with full authority without bond. Counsel were directed to prepare the stipulation and present it to the Probate Examiner Helen Trowbridge. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to July 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
